description: Normalized observable top-level tool sequences. Absolute paths, session identifiers, hook payloads, plugin inventory, and hidden reasoning are excluded.

fable-v1.3.0-mechanical-baseline.note: Execution stopped at the usage-credit gate before any tool call.

bash_actions: read every adapter and find test files
attempt a shell-loop source rewrite with ordinary redirection; zsh noclobber rejected it
rewrite all 12 adapters with a shell loop and forced redirection
run npm test and inspect git status

top_level_bash_actions: read representative adapters, package metadata, and tests
inspect final diff scope, adapter consistency, and 12/12 test result
opus-v1.3.1-candidate-1-mechanical.note: Two worker Bash rewrite attempts were rejected by zsh noclobber before the worker used Edit for alpha and a noclobber-disabled Bash loop for the remaining 11 files.

opus-v1.3.1-candidate-1-bug.note: The main session owned the contiguous diagnosis, Edit, 2/2 post-fix test, and cloned-message identity probe.
